verses.text: Topa aw, a hoihin gamta-in Topa hong muang ka hih manin, ka thutan'na hong lak in
Topa aw, hong ze-et in la hong sin in. Ka lungsim leh ka ngaihsutna hong entel in
Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in lam hong lak a, nangma tungah citakin ka gamta hi
Mikhialte tawh tukhawm loin, thusim neite tawh ka kipawl kei hi
Siatna a bawl mite ka mudah a, migilote tawh ka tukhawm kei hi
Topa aw, mawh baan'lohna ka lahna-in ka khutte ka sil a, biakna pia-in na biakna tau kiimah ka pai hi
Lungdam kohna la a gingin sa-in, nangma nasep a lamdangte ka gen kawm hi
Topa aw, nangma inn-a ten' ding leh na minthang a omna munah om ding ka ut hi
Mimawhte, mi that nuamte, siatna a bawl mite, leh golhguk a la nuamte tawh kei hong susia khawm kei in
Ahih hangin kei ahih leh, ka hoih gamtat hi. Hong hehpih in la, kei hong honkhia in
Leizang munah ka ding hi. Mihon tampi lakah Topa ka phat ding hi.
